notes: Neutral baseline manifest. No hidden tests, no #301 implementation on this branch. Defines what must be recorded identically for treatments A and B -- does not itself contain measured values.

controlledVariables.crossTreatmentAccess: forbidden -- no read access to the other branch, worktree, transcript, or artifacts

levels.label: no-cache
levels.description: Prompt caching explicitly disabled by benchmark override; no parent/child cache present or injected.

levels.label: cache-hit
levels.description: Valid parent-cache-issue-278.json + grill-cache-issue-301.json prepared and validated before measurement; cacheStatus: valid on both; injected per prompt-caching SKILL.md order.

timingBoundary.endEvent: after Validate completes and post-validation Harness Optimization completes
excluded: cache preparation and validation time (B only)
timingBoundary.executorDurationRule: report only when a distinguishable phase boundary exists in runtime evidence; otherwise null with unavailableReason

tokenUsage.unavailableReason: populate only when platform telemetry provides it; never estimate

excludedFromImplementationLoc: this measurement manifest and the benchmark plan
estimationPolicy: Never estimate unavailable token or timing data. Use null plus a one-line unavailableReason. Do not average, extrapolate, or backfill from other runs.

testCommands.hiddenSuite: path defined only on experiment/301-evaluator -- resolve at grading time, never hardcode here
